summary: Notification system testing complete. All backend APIs pass (21/21 tests). Frontend notification bell visible and opens dropdown. Practice Management tabs all working after refactoring.

issues: Notification bell visible in Practice Management page header but not clearly visible in main Dashboard - likely due to positioning at x:1851 being at the edge of viewport. Mobile bell exists but hidden on desktop.

critical_code_review_comments: NotificationBell component properly implemented with data-testid attributes
Backend notification APIs follow best practices with proper auth and CSRF protection
Reminder preferences support 15min (15), 1hr (60), and 1day (1440) timing options

success_rate.frontend: 100% (notification bell clickable, dropdown opens, all Practice Management tabs work)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification system fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/notifications (returns list+unread_count), GET /api/notifications/unread-count, GET /api/notifications/reminder-preferences, PUT /api/notifications/reminder-preferences (requires CSRF). Frontend: NotificationBell component at /app/frontend/src/components/NotificationBell.jsx with data-testid='notification-bell' and data-testid='notification-dropdown'. Practice Management 10 tabs confirmed working: Dashboard, Clients, Cases, Doc Generator, Documents, Calendar, Tasks, Invoices, Templates, Messages.

features_verified.notification_bell_in_header: PASS - Bell icon visible in top-right of Practice Management page header (position 1851,37)
features_verified.notification_dropdown_opens: PASS - Clicking bell opens dropdown showing 'Notifications' header and 'No notifications' empty state
features_verified.GET_notifications: PASS - Returns notifications array and unread_count
features_verified.GET_reminder_preferences: PASS - Returns all preference fields (in_app_*, email_*, reminder_times)
features_verified.PUT_reminder_preferences: PASS - Updates preferences with CSRF protection, verified persistence
features_verified.practice_management_tabs: PASS - All 10 tabs clickable and working (Dashboard, Clients, Cases, Doc Generator, Documents, Calendar, Tasks, Invoices, Templates, Messages)
